See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 4822 => 'Warszawa', 4824 => 'Płock', 4829 => 'Ostrołęka', 4833 => 'Bielsko-Biała', 4842 => 'Łódź', 4854 => 'Włocławek', 4859 => 'Słupsk', 4867 => 'Piła', 4871 => 'Wrocław', 4874 => 'Wałbrzych', 4882 => 'Chełm', 4883 => 'Biała Podlaska', 4885 => 'Białystok', 4886 => 'Łomża', 4887 => 'Suwałki', ];
